title: Section 25
content: 1[25. Other authorities of the University.--The constitution, powers and functions of the Artha-Samiti (Finance Committee), the Institute Board and of such other authorities as may be declared by the Statutes to be authorities of the University shall be such as may be prescribed by the Statutes.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 16, ibid., for section 25 (w.e.f. 8-8-1984).
